title: ACE Ultra Floral for Whites – Powerful Laundry Bleach for Brilliant Whites – Deep Cleaning & Tough Stain Removal Formula – Brightens & Revives Fabrics
features: Advanced Whitening Formula – Restores dull and yellowed fabrics to bright, brilliant white with every wash.
Powerful Stain Removal – Effectively removes tough stains like sweat, food, dirt, and everyday grime.
Deep Cleaning Action – Penetrates fabric fibers for a hygienic, fresh clean that lasts.
Safe for Regular Use – Tough on stains but gentle on clothes, suitable for frequent laundering.
Versatile Fabric Care – Ideal for white clothes, towels, linens, school uniforms, and more.
description: Product description ACE Ultra for Whites – Professional-Strength Whitening & Deep Cleaning Solution Revive your whites and elevate your laundry routine with ACE Ultra for Whites – the ultimate solution for brilliantly clean, fresh, and radiant white fabrics. Engineered with an advanced stain-fighting and whitening formula , ACE penetrates deep into fibers to eliminate the toughest stains, grey tones, and yellowing – restoring your clothes to their original brilliance. This powerful yet fabric-safe bleach is perfect for everyday laundry or restoring older items, ensuring your whites stay dazzling wash after wash. From white shirts and towels to bed linens and uniforms, ACE Ultra for Whites delivers results you can see and freshness you can feel. 🌟 Why Choose ACE Ultra for Whites? Maximum Whitening Power – Brightens dull fabrics and removes greying or yellowing for a crisp, radiant finish. Professional-Grade Stain Removal – Effectively eliminates sweat, food, dirt, and long-set stains. Deep Hygiene Clean – Targets bacteria and buildup for a deep, sanitary clean. Safe for Regular Use – Tough on stains, gentle on fabrics – ideal for frequent washing. Restores & Protects – Revives old whites and maintains brilliance with every wash. 🧺 Perfect For: White clothing (shirts, socks, undergarments) Towels and bath linens Bed sheets and pillowcases School and work uniforms Sportswear and kitchen fabrics Bring your whites back to life with ACE Ultra – the trusted choice for radiant laundry care. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Hypochlorite, Sodium Hydroxide, Sodium Chloride Directions Dilute 1 part bleach with 9 parts water for general laundry use. Always wear gloves and ensure proper ventilation when handling. Do not mix with other cleaning products. After use, rinse container thoroughly and dispose of in accordance with local regulations. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Always follow the instructions on the product label. See more
